# Seunghwan Um (엄승환 / rush / r-ush)

> PhD student at Robotics Innovatory, Sungkyunkwan University (SKKU), South Korea.
> Also known as "rush" or "r-ush" (GitHub: github.com/r-ush).
> Supervised by Prof. Hyouk Ryeol Choi.
> Research focus: physically intelligent gripper design, learning-friendly grippers for imitation and reinforcement learning, robotic grasping and manipulation in unstructured environments.

## Publications

- **PALM-Gripper: Integrated Gripper with Parallel AdaptabLe Mechanism for Shelf Picking in Logistics** (IEEE Transactions on Mechatronics, 2026). Authors: Seunghwan Um, Yeong Gwang Son, Juyong Hong, Chun Soo Kim, Issac Rhee, Heeyeon Jeong, Hyouk Ryeol Choi. Paper: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11361366
- **Toward Reliable Bin-Picking: Collision-Aware Robotic Design and Control Strategy for Heavily Cluttered Environment** (IEEE Robotics and Automation Practice, 2026). Authors: Seunghwan Um, Yeong Gwang Son, Jaeyun Sim, Hyouk Ryeol Choi. Paper: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11358698
- **Plug-and-Play Shape Matching Module for Zero-Shot Mesh-Free Grasp Refinement on Unknown Objects** (IEEE RA-L, presented at ICRA 2026). Authors: Juyong Hong, Yeong Gwang Son, Seunghwan Um, Hyouk Ryeol Choi. Paper: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/11206455
- **Overcoming Heavy Clutter: Utilizing the Hybrid Grasping Network and Gripper** (IROS 2024 Workshop, Best Extended Abstract). Authors: Seunghwan Um, Yeong Gwang Son, Tat Hieu Bui, Ho Sang Jung, Hyouk Ryeol Choi.
- **Development of Adaptive Gripper Enhancing Power Grasp Range and Linearity** (IEEE Access, 2024). Authors: Issac Rhee, Chun Soo Kim, Heeyeon Jeong, Seung Jae Moon, Seunghwan Um, Yeong Gwang Son, Yong Bum Kim, Ho Sang Jung, Hyouk Ryeol Choi. Paper: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/10583863
- **ReC-Gripper: A Reconfigurable Combined Suction and Fingered Gripper for Various Logistics Picking and Stowing Tasks** (IEEE RA-L, presented at ICRA 2024). Authors: Seunghwan Um, Heeyeon Jeong, Chun Soo Kim, Issac Rhee, Hyouk Ryeol Choi. Paper: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10306271

## Awards

- 1st Place, Robot Engineering & Design Show (RED Show) at KRoC, 2026
- Bronze Prize, Samsung Humantech Paper Award, 2025
- 2nd Place, 9th Robotic Grasping and Manipulation Competition (RGMC) at ICRA, 2024
- Best Prize, 3D Design for the Future (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy), 2023

## Project Pages

- Scooping Grasping with Robotic Hand: https://r-ush.github.io/scooping_robotic_hand/
- Impedance Control with M0609 (Doosan): https://r-ush.github.io/m0609_impedance_control/
- Admittance Control with RB10: https://r-ush.github.io/rb10_admittance_control/
